headline: 4 GARP Stocks That Investors Can Scoop Up for Maximum Returns
summary: The GARP strategy helps investors gain exposure to stocks that have solid prospects and are trading at a discount. GFF, RL, ABBNY and ADSK are some such stocks.

headline: Ralph Lauren Revenue Milestone Highlights China Growth And Customization Push
summary: Ralph Lauren (NYSE:RL) has reported annual revenue above $8b for the first time in its history. The company highlighted sales growth of more than 50% in China in its latest quarter. Ralph Lauren is expanding its product customization capabilities through work with VU Custom and YR ID. Ralph Lauren, trading around $363.51, is coming off a strong multi year share price run, with the stock up 30.5% over the past year and more than tripling over the past 3 years.
